text: Operator Name Description Example + Addition Adds together two values. x+y - Subtraction Subtracts one value from another x-y o Multiplication Multiplies two values xty / Division Divides one value by another x/y % Modulus Returns the division remainder X%y, - Increment Increases the value of a variable by 1 +4x - Decrement Decreases the value of a variable by 1 -
